hints.description: This global media and information services company operates across two main segments: News Media and Digital Real Estate Services. Its News Media segment publishes newspapers and operates digital news websites, while its Digital Real Estate Services segment, through *****, provides classifieds, job listings, and other online services. Founded by Rupert *****, the company is notable for its extensive reach and influence in the global news landscape.
hints.funFact1: Before its current structure, the company was part of a much larger media conglomerate, *****, which was split into two separate entities in 2013. This separation involved spinning off the entertainment assets into a new company.
hints.funFact2: ***** owns Dow Jones & Company, which publishes *The Wall Street Journal*, and has a significant presence in the UK through its ownership of The Times and The Sunday Times newspapers.
